---
title: "Social medicine study guide"
---

## NotebookLM Resources

Explore the AI-generated study materials (NotebookLM) for the following subjects:

* [Social Medicine](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/8239ce6e-f545-4cca-b3b3-a808487a6ce2)
* [Biostatistics](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/4a653e2e-14e0-4ffe-8ac7-942fa7b0c100)
* [Bioethics](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/5344e475-f3d5-407f-b276-e349afcadb89)
* [Epidemiology](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/6306fd66-2009-4131-84be-79b7201eb536)
* [Hygiene](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/00a56955-d080-48d3-bdd9-899ea473a7fd)

## Study Guide PDF

```{=html}
<div class="pdf-container">
    <p>If the PDF does not appear, you can <a href="SOCIAL_SEMESTER_BOOK_EN.pdf" target="_blank">download it here</a>.</p>
    <iframe src="SOCIAL_SEMESTER_BOOK_EN.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none;"></iframe>
</div>
```
